git.working_tree_note: The regime_factor_selection/ module is UNTRACKED (git status '??') at write time -- the code that produced these results is not yet committed. head_commit is the ASADO repo HEAD, not a commit that contains this module. Commit the module to make this stamp binding (this is exactly the regime2.md-vs-regime.md silent-overwrite risk PRD section 4 warns about).

frozen_thresholds.regime_split: bottom 30% Recession / middle 40% Neutral / top 30% Growth

data_coverage.ip_ticker_sharing_note: US/NASDAQ/US SmallCap share IP YOY Index; ChinaA/ChinaH share CHVAIOY Index; Hong Kong has its own ticker. All 34 T2 pseudo-countries resolve to an IP series -> full 34/34 coverage, above PRD section 6's <10 insufficiency floor.

factor_universe.exclusion_reason: no cross-sectional dispersion (identical value broadcast to every country each date -> within-date cross-sectional rank-IC test is undefined). Non-tunable, structural.

gdp_exploratory.note: NON-PRIMARY, separate FDR family, never pooled with IP (PRD section 2.1).

placebo.shuffle: per-country independent permutation of the regime-label sequence; marginals preserved, date-alignment destroyed
placebo.interpretation: Placebo passes 0 factors under FDR, same as the real test, and its raw p<0.10 count (8) sits right at the ~7.4 expected by chance -- vs 18 in the real test. The machinery does NOT manufacture significance, so it neither invalidates nor rescues the real result: the null stands on its own.

verdict: LEANING NULL / NULL confirmed -- 0 of 74 factors clear FDR at alpha=0.10 (PRD section 6 '<8 factors' branch). Placebo confirms the FDR machinery is well-calibrated. Stop; do not sweep thresholds.
recommendation: STOP. Pre-registered null: no genuine per-country regime-conditional factor-selection edge in this data. Do not proceed to Phase 2.
